subcodes.title: Ziyarat
subcodes.first_line: I bear witness that there is no God but God, alone and without partner, even as His own Self hath testified unto His own Self that there is no God but Him, the Mighty, the All-Wise. And I bear witness that Muhammad is Thy servant, whom Thou hast singled out for Thyself and chosen for Thy Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله تعالی اذا اردت زیارة احد من ائمة العدل اتبع.... اشهد ان لا اله الا الله وحده لا شریک له کما شهد ذاته لذاته ان لا اله الا هو العزیز الحکیم و اشهد ان محمدا عبدک الذی استخلصته لنفسک و اصطنعته لولایتک
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @identity; relationship of Manifestation of God to God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
